MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KEMP, STAN AS TO DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA NIKCHEMNY, STELLA MACHINME, STACY NIKCHEMNY, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-13-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-25-2002, OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEMP, STAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,775.00, STELLA MACHINME IS CORRECTED TO: STELLA NIKCHEMNAYA. STELLA NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. STACY MACHINME IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STACY NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED W/O PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROOF THAT PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF.
